topic: Gumloop Review 2026: AI-Native Workflow Automation Platform

key_points: Zapier has 8,000+ integrations vs Gumloop's ~100+
Zapier built for deterministic workflows pre-AI era, added AI later
Best for business users needing breadth of integrations and reliability
More expensive at scale but more mature ecosystem
n8n is open-source and self-hostable — Gumloop is cloud-only SaaS
n8n offers granular control and 400+ integrations
n8n free self-hosted vs Gumloop's paid cloud plans
n8n better for developers; Gumloop better for non-technical teams
Lindy focuses on AI assistants and agents rather than general workflow automation
Lindy has deeper CRM and email integrations out of the box
Gumloop more flexible for custom multi-step workflows
Both target teams wanting AI-first automation
Vellum targets LLM application development specifically
Gumloop broader scope covering general business workflows
Vellum better for ML teams; Gumloop for operations/marketing teams
Vellum has stronger prompt versioning and evaluation features
Make (Integromat) offers 3,000+ integrations at lower price than Zapier
Make's learning curve steeper than Gumloop's visual builder
Make better for complex data transformation workflows
Gumloop better for AI-driven agent automation vs Make's rule-based approach

stats.fact: Gumloop raised $50 million Series B in March 2026, led by Benchmark with participation from Shopify Ventures, Y Combinator, and First Round Capital
Total funding raised by Gumloop: $70 million as of early 2026
Gumloop was founded as a Y Combinator Winter 2024 startup
Gumloop offers 100+ native integrations plus 50+ MCP servers, compared to Zapier's 8,000+ integrations
Gumloop provides access to GPT-5, Claude 4 Opus, Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Gemini 2.5 Pro — new frontier models added within days of release
Gumloop Free plan includes 2,000 credits; Solo plan starts at $37/month with 10,000 credits
Team plan costs $244/month for up to 10 seats and 60,000 credits
Complex AI workflow calls consume 20-60 credits per call using GPT-4.1, Claude Opus, or enrichment nodes
Gumloop features 115+ pre-made workflow blocks for quick automation building
Gumloop's G2 review base is small (approximately 6 reviews) indicating early-stage platform maturity

angles: AI-native vs bolt-on AI: Why Gumloop's ground-up AI architecture gives it a fundamental edge over legacy tools like Zapier
Gumloop's $50M Series B and what the Benchmark/Shopify Ventures backing signals about the future of AI workflow automation
Gummie meta-agent deep dive: How Gumloop lets non-technical users build automation pipelines through natural language
Credit pricing trap: When Gumloop gets expensive and how to calculate your real monthly cost before committing
Integration gap reality check: Gumloop at 100+ vs Zapier at 8,000+ — does it matter for most teams in 2026?
Multi-model LLM access as a differentiator: GPT-5, Claude 4, Gemini 2.5 in one platform
Who should NOT use Gumloop: honest assessment for teams that need enterprise integrations or minimal learning curve
